{{Quote|What do you lylek-dung-grubbers want with me?|Swilja to Tsavong Lah|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest">''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]''</ref>}}
'''Swilja Fenn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] in the [[New Jedi Order]] and a member of [[Clan Fenn]].

Fenn was named after Twi'lek legendary princess [[Swilja]], known for her beauty.

==Biography==
===Yuuzhan Vong War===
{{Quote|The Force is stronger than you. The Jedi will be your end, Tsavong Lah!|Swilja's final words|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest" />}}
During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Swilja was pursued and caught by [[Peace Brigade|Peace Brigadiers]] on [[Cujicor]]. She had been dumped on a nameless moon for the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] to collect. They transported her to [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]], who congratulated her on proving herself worthy of honored sacrifice, to which Swilja tried to lash out and attack Lah but to no avail.

Lah asked her to help deliver [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] to him. When she refused, instructing him to ''"Eat [[Bantha fodder/Legends|poodoo]]"'', he turned her over to interrogators, and finally killed her personally.

During her imprisonment and [[Torture/Legends|torture]] with the Yuuzhan Vong, Swilja was ready to embrace the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]], but due to their blindness to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], knew even that would be ineffectual.

During the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Convocation|conclave]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], [[Kyp Durron]] used her death and others, to argue for a more aggressive resistance to the Yuuzhan Vong.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Swil.jpg|thumb|200px|A potential Swilja from ''[[Star Wars: Union]]'']]
A female Twi'lek with fair skin appeared in the ''[[Star Wars: Union]]'' comics. When queried about this on the StarWars.com forums, [[Leland Chee]] initially said this ''could'' be Swilja,<ref>{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=855#15714853|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2006-09-29|time=12:30 PM}}</ref> followed by a later comment saying this is ''probably'' Swilja.<ref>{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?messageID=17137740#17137740|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Leland Y Chee]]}}</ref>
